source: International Standard Bible Encyclopaedia (James Orr ed., 1915)
html:
bool'-wark: The word represents several Hebrew terms (chel, Isa 26:1; chelah, Ps 48:13; matsodh, Ec 9:14; matsor, De 20:20). In 2Ch 26:15 the word is translated in the Revised Version (British and American) "battlements."

See FORTIFICATION.
